name: oscar-tabular-mcp
description: Tabular Review store for Oscar GC, exposed as a stdio-transport MCP server. Owns the grid schema, deterministic merge-by-(document,column), a zero-LLM grounding gate, and atomic per-review persistence in the matter folder. No LLM calls; no sub-agent spawning (the agent fans out via Goose Summon).
author: s-arturko
